title: oxyacantha vulgaris
intro: Oxyacantha vulgaris, also known as the common hawthorn plant, is a deciduous shrub or small tree with thorny branches and pink or white flowers. The medicinal properties of Oxyacantha vulgaris lie in its berries, leaves, and flowers, which are rich in flavonoids, oligomeric proanthocyanidins, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of the plant include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the cardiovascular system, as well as its potential to help with symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Oxyacantha vulgaris is commonly prepared as herbal teas, supplements, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to support heart health and overall well-being.
